name: npu-dev-toolbox
title: NPU Dev Toolbox
description: On-device dev helpers: open a workspace in your terminal/IDE/Explorer, and generate Git commit messages with Phi-Silica.
author: user

commands.name: open-workspace
commands.title: Open Workspace
commands.description: Open the current Explorer folder or a subfolder workspace in Explorer, a terminal, and/or your IDE.

commands.name: workspace-history
commands.title: Workspace History
commands.description: Open and manage previously used workspaces.

commands.name: commit-message
commands.title: Commit Message
commands.description: Generate a Git commit message for the active repo using Phi-Silica.

preferences.name: defaultOpenTarget
preferences.title: Default Open Action
preferences.description: Which action to run for the primary 'Open (Default)' action.

preferences.name: terminalChoice
preferences.title: Terminal
preferences.description: Which terminal to launch when 'Open in Terminal' is run.

preferences.name: terminalNewTab
preferences.title: Windows Terminal
preferences.description: When enabled, Windows Terminal opens a new tab in an existing window instead of a new window.
preferences.label: Open as a new tab in an existing Windows Terminal window

preferences.name: terminalCustomPath
preferences.title: Terminal Custom Path
preferences.description: Full path to a .exe or .lnk to use when 'Terminal' is set to 'Custom Path'.

preferences.name: ideChoice
preferences.title: IDE
preferences.description: Which IDE/editor to launch when 'Open in IDE' is run.

preferences.name: ideCustomPath
preferences.title: IDE Custom Path
preferences.description: Full path to a .exe or .lnk to use when 'IDE' is set to 'Custom Path'.

preferences.name: commitStyle
preferences.title: Commit Style
preferences.description: Default commit message style for the Commit Message command.
